name: What evidence proves a doc needs AEO?
description: **Trade secret harm proof required.** Not automatic.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: What evidence proves a doc needs AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Trade secret harm proof required.** Not automatic.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Evidence like trade secret value, competitive harm justifies AEO.** Mere sensitivity insufficient.[1] Key factors: Specific testimony/docs showing risk. Competitor nexus. Court scrutiny high. Pre-designate judiciously. Expert affidavits strengthen.
